calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg, via ZOOM, counsel for David Keeler, Administrator.

At the outset, the court queries Ms. Friedeberg as to whether she is aware of any objections to this petition. Ms. Friedeberg does not believe that there are any objections. The court queries Ms. Friedberg regarding the position of the request for an additional $2100 in fees. Ms. Friedeberg advises that she has spent at least two hours with this matter, including today's appearance, since filing the petition. After further discussion, the matter was submitted.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Continued To Oct-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia, Esq., counsel specially appearing for David Keeler, Administrator (appearing by video conference).

Ms. Navia represents to the Court that she has been advised by Mr. Keeler's regular counsel that the Petition either was filed yesterday [October 5, 2020] or will be filed shortly. At the Court's request, the Clerk reviews the Register of Actions and no filing or pending filing can be found.

The Court continues the matter to October 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. If counsel has filed the Petition by that date, no appearance is necessary on October 27th.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: Deputy Johnson. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for and with David Keeler.

Ms. Friedeberg stated that they had a hearing in the related case, that a settlement was reached and needs to be approved, that the parties have agreed that Mr. Keeler should go ahead and sell the property, that there will never be any funds going into this estate and that this was solely for the purpose of having authority to deal with the mortgage issue. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with limited authority (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for October 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2018 Continued To Oct-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Special Administrator.

Ms. Friedeberg stated that the special letters were for getting authorization over the mortgage, that the property is in the Trefault Estate, but the mortgage is in this Estate, that the parties just reached a settlement a month ago and the next week one of the beneficiaries died, and that the Successor in Interest is a Minor and they are starting a guardianship for her. Ms. Friedeberg also stated that they still need the special letters each to pay the mortgage, that the mortgage is being paid from rental income from the property that is in the Trefault Estate, and that they tried paying the mortgage for months and the bank would refuse it. In addition, Ms. Firedeberg informed the Court that there is now a proposed settlement for a buyout of the property. The Petition for Letters of Administration and the special letters are continued for one more month to October 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that there will not be a further extension of the special letters.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Sep-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melanie Emmons for David Keeler (Special Administrator).

Ms. Emmons appeared for the purpose of obtaining an order extending the special letters of administration (order extending letters to September 25, 2018 signed in open Court). The Petition for Letters of Administration is also continued to September 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder for David Keeler (Special Administrator).

Mr. Feder appeared for the purpose of having the special letters of administration extended to July 24, 2018. The Court granted Mr. Feder's request (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Letters of Administration is also continued to July 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
